scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,server,frontend -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.generate:api: npm run generate:openapi && npx --yes --package openapi-typescript@7.13.0 openapi-typescript frontend/src/lib/openapi.json -o frontend/src/lib/api.generated.ts --alphabetize
scripts.check:api: npm run check:openapi && npm run check:api-types
scripts.check: npm run test:backend && npm run check:api && npm run check:server && npm run check:frontend
